dc_description: A forward-facing view from a bicycle or motorcycle traveling on a narrow paved rural road. Dry golden grasses and green shrubs line both sides of the road, with low wooded hills in the background. A small gray car drives ahead in the same lane. The foreground shows blurred handlebars or vehicle controls. On a hilltop near the center distance, there is a stone tower or monument. The sky is bright blue with scattered white clouds.
novel_visual_observations: The road has white edge markings and no visible center divider. A black-and-red roadside reflector post appears on the right shoulder.
location_name: Strada Provinciale di Radicofani, Radicofani, Siena
rich_context: Strada Provinciale di Radicofani, Radicofani, Unione dei Comuni Amiata Val d'Orcia, Siena, Toscana, Italia
